Container.Name: AppFlowy-MinIO
Container.Overview: MinIO S3-compatible object storage for AppFlowy Cloud file uploads, attachments, and collaboration snapshots. Deploy third. Part of the AppFlowy Cloud stack.
Container.Description:
MinIO — S3-compatible object storage for all AppFlowy file uploads, attachments, and collaboration data blobs.

The Web UI (MinIO Console) is accessible on port 9001. The S3 API is on port 9000 (internal network only).

Deploy order: (1) AppFlowy-Postgres → (2) AppFlowy-Redis → (3) AppFlowy-MinIO → (4) AppFlowy-GoTrue → (5) AppFlowy-Cloud → (6) AppFlowy-Admin, AppFlowy-Web, AppFlowy-Worker, AppFlowy-Search → (7) AppFlowy-Nginx

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Persistent storage for all MinIO buckets and objects.

Config.Name: Root User (Access Key)
Config.Description: MinIO root username / S3 access key. Change this for production.

Config.Name: Root Password (Secret Key)
Config.Description: MinIO root password / S3 secret key. Change this for production. Must match APPFLOWY_S3_SECRET_KEY in other services.

Config.Name: Browser Redirect URL
Config.Description: Public URL for the MinIO web console. Set to http://YOUR_SERVER_IP/minio (or your domain).

Config.Name: MinIO Console Port
Config.Description: MinIO web console port — accessible from your browser.

Config.Name: MinIO API Port (internal)
Config.Description: MinIO S3 API port — used internally by AppFlowy services. No host port needed unless you need direct S3 access.
